  "keyPoints": [
    "Ordinary variables are defined inside a Bash script and are not available outside the script.",
    "Environment variables are defined outside of a Bash script and are available throughout the entire program.",
    "To access environment variables in a Bash script, use the \$ variable (e.g. \$PATH).",
